description:
Navigate to the project 'HPLC Method Development - Compound ABX-1431', experiment 'Column Screening Phase 1', and task 'C18 Column - Gradient Test A' in SciNote. Document observations by adding two sequential comments to the task's activity feed.

Comment 1: "Mobile phase A: 0.1% formic acid in water, Mobile phase B: acetonitrile. Gradient 5-95% B over 20 min. Observed good peak shape for ABX-1431 at Rt=12.3 min with tailing factor 1.08."

Comment 2: "Resolution between ABX-1431 and des-methyl impurity (Rt=11.9 min) is Rs=1.3, below target of Rs>1.5. Recommend testing shallower gradient 5-60% B over 30 min in next run."
